domain_context: Salon Queue System (Hybrid: Marketing, Manager Dashboard, Customer Public Page)
emotional_tone: Calm, premium, grounded, highly functional yet organic. Reduces wait-time anxiety while projecting luxury.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Containers use p-6 to p-12. Deeply asymmetrical grids for marketing, hyper-dense functional grids for dashboards.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Hero spans 8 cols, secondary visual spans 4.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Main queue table spans 3 cols, quick actions/summary spans 1 col.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align forms and dense data. Optical alignment for icons inside buttons.

components.buttons: Rounded-full for marketing, rounded-lg for dashboard. Always explicitly set hover:text color.
components.cards: Dashboard cards are flat, 1px subtle border (border-stone-200). No heavy drop shadows. Hover brings slight -translate-y-1 and shadow-lg.
components.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header (z-50) over content. Never fully transparent.
components.forms: Use Shadcn components heavily customized to match the Organic & Earthy palette. Soft borders, warm focus rings (focus:ring-[#C47C5C]).
components.tables: Shadcn tables. Strip default gray stripes; use warm-tinted borders and high contrast row hovers.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons need transform scale-95 on active, subtle background color shift on hover.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='login-form-submit-button').

hero_background.description: Abstract fluid shapes in warm sand, terracotta, and soft moss green colors. Perfect for landing page or customer app background.
hero_background.usage: Marketing hero section background (overlay with bg-white/40 for text contrast) or customer public queue page background.

salon_interior.usage: Marketing page feature image, 'About the Salon' or 'Business Owner' contextual sections.

customer_waiting.description: People waiting, looking at their phones.
customer_waiting.usage: Testimonial section or 'How it works' for the customer side.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy). Do not use Vercel-like blue/purple themes.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the landing page layout (Bento Grid, asymmetrical) without rigid Shadcn wrappers.
Use Shadcn UI for the Manager Dashboard and Settings, but override borders/colors to match the warm sand palette.
Implement the customer queue page as a mobile-first interface with large, bold token numbers using the chosen typography.
Include data-testid on every clickable button, form submit, and dynamic queue action.
Ensure the waitlist dashboard utilizes Shadcn Table components with real-time status indication (Moss Green for serving, Soft Clay for waiting).
Ensure all backgrounds that host text maintain a 4.5:1 WCAG contrast ratio. Use glassmorphism ONLY with a proper solid overlay behind it.
CRITICAL: Use .js and .jsx extensions for all React components. Do NOT create .tsx files.
